opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I saved my $1,200 couch from my cats for $47
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, stained, pet-hair-covered sofa that guests are embarrassed to sit on
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, taut, like-new couch in 10 minutes — no one can tell it's a cover
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season is peaking in late April — pet owners are desperate for a couch rescue solution right now.

opportunities.specific_product: expandable pull-out under-sink cabinet organizer with two tiers
opportunities.transformation_hook: My bathroom went from a black hole to a spa for $32

opportunities.after_state: Fully visible, tiered, spa-clean cabinet where everything has a place and nothing falls out
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning content is algorithmically favored through May — bathroom transformation Reels are driving massive saves and shares right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia herb stripper and multi-peeler kitchen tool set
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $26 set cut my meal prep time in half
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered junk drawer of mismatched peelers and gadgets that never work, slow and frustrating prep
opportunities.after_state: Streamlined 3-piece set that handles every prep task fast — clean counters, faster dinners

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper contour pillow with adjustable fill
opportunities.transformation_hook: I woke up without neck pain for the first time in years — $89
opportunities.before_state: Flat, lumpy old pillow causing daily morning neck stiffness, poor sleep, and constant fatigue
opportunities.after_state: Custom-contoured neck support delivering uninterrupted sleep and pain-free mornings
buyer_intent_keywords: how to fix neck pain from sleeping
opportunities.why_now: Sleep quality content trends every spring as daylight savings disruption recedes — neck pain angle drives urgent buyer searches with strong conversion.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products faux leather storage ottoman with tray lid
opportunities.transformation_hook: I replaced my coffee table with this $68 piece and gained hidden storage
opportunities.before_state: Living room overrun with throw blankets, remotes, and kids' toys with nowhere to put them
opportunities.after_state: Stylish ottoman doubles as coffee table, seating, and hidden storage — room looks twice as big
